calendar.matters:
For Status Of Filing Of Receipt For The Purchase Of Annuities For The Benefit Of Minor: Liam Cronin And Approval Of Special Needs Trust By The Probate Department
Off Calendar Jul-14-2015 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Apr-03-2015 Continued To Apr-16-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2015 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Apr-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Paula Shi, CSR#13358.
Rebecca L. Byrne, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioners: Patricia Ryan and Bartholomew Cronin, mother and father, and guardians ad litem for Minor: Liam Cronin, present in court.
Petitioners sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $5,850,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $946,919.07 payable to Mitchell Law Group.
Other authorized disbursements payable directly to third parties in the total amountof $276,982.90 $2,800.00 to Edward J. Nevin for litigation costs
$12,182.90 Mitchell Lw Group for litigation costs
$250,000.00 to Patriacia Ryan and Bartholomew Ryan
$12,000.00 Cost Reserve.
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement of judgment: $1,294,029.75

A net balance of $4,555,970.25 to be be disbursed as follows:
$3,150,000.00 to be paid to fund two separate annuity accounts in equal amounts with USAA Insurance Life Inc. Co., and Metropolitan Life Ins. Co. Said annuities will generate a monthly income of $14,680.29 guaranteed for 25 years. Said Income will be paid to a Special Needs Trust which will be initially funded with the remaining $1,405,970.25.
Petitioner and Petitioner's attorney are ordered to pay to Dept. of Health Care Services. Recovery Branch. MS4720, Sacramento, CA 95899-7421 the amount of $70,127.78 by check out of the proceeds of the settlement.
Order approving minor's compromise signed in open court.

Status Hearing Scheduled on July 14, 2015 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the purchase of annuities for the benefit of minor: Liam Croning and Approval of Special Needs Trust by the Probate Department. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
